grade_rationale: 3 P1 findings (exceeds C-grade max of 2 P1s). Grade thresholds: A=0 P1; B=0 P1; C≤2 P1; D=otherwise.

escalations.title: Handlebars.js Multiple JavaScript Injection CVEs
escalations.exploit_scenario: If handlebars renders templates derived from user input (workflow definitions, assessment notes), attacker can inject arbitrary JavaScript via AST type confusion. Full backend RCE.
escalations.investigation_required: Verify if handlebars is direct dependency; audit all template rendering calls for user-controlled input.

escalations.title: protobufjs Arbitrary Code Execution in Orchestrator
escalations.exploit_scenario: Maliciously crafted protobuf input triggers arbitrary code execution in orchestrator process. Orchestrator controls entire build pipeline — compromise allows artifact tampering.
escalations.owner: solo-session (human) — pipeline agents cannot touch platform/
escalations.reason_blocked: platform/ is critical infrastructure per CLAUDE.md, requires solo-session

p1_findings.title: GET /api/search endpoint not registered — runtime 404
p1_findings.impact: DependencyPicker modal broken in production. Every search attempt returns 404. Dependency feature unusable.
p1_findings.fix: Create Source/Backend/src/routes/search.ts filtering store.getAllItems() by ?q= on title/description. Register in app.ts. All 5 test cases in search.test.ts must pass.

p2_findings.title: pending_dependencies WorkItemStatus missing — dispatch returns 400 instead
p2_findings.fix: Add PendingDependencies='pending_dependencies' to WorkItemStatus. Update VALID_STATUS_TRANSITIONS. Change dispatch to set status instead of returning 400. Update cascade in onItemResolved.

p2_findings.title: dependencyCheckDuration Prometheus histogram not implemented
p2_findings.fix: Add dependencyCheckDuration Histogram to metrics.ts. Instrument isReady() and detectCycle() in dependency.ts. Add test assertion in metrics.test.ts.

p2_findings.title: Traceability enforcer scope too narrow — PASSED is a false positive
p2_findings.fix: Add status banners to dev-workflow-platform.md and tiered-merge-pipeline.md. Expand enforcer config to scan all active spec files.

p2_findings.title: Dual logger modules — inconsistent import paths
p2_findings.fix: Consolidate to utils/logger.ts with object-style interface. Remove compat logger.ts. Update all imports.

p3_findings.title: LOG_LEVEL env var not respected — all log levels always emitted
p3_findings.fix: Add level guard in emit(): compare LOG_LEVELS.indexOf(level) against minLevel from process.env.LOG_LEVEL.

p3_findings.title: No OpenTelemetry tracing — architecture rule + FR-021
p3_findings.fix: Add @opentelemetry/auto-instrumentations-node. Add custom spans around workflow state transitions. Propagate traceparent header in app.ts middleware.

p3_findings.title: No route latency Prometheus histogram
p3_findings.fix: Add http_request_duration_seconds Histogram to metrics.ts. Add middleware in app.ts to record and observe request duration.

p3_findings.title: dev-workflow-platform.md 69 FRs with 0 source refs — needs status banner
p3_findings.fix: Add <!-- Status: ROADMAP — not yet implemented. Active implementation: workflow-engine.md --> banner at top of file.

p3_findings.title: tiered-merge-pipeline.md 10 FRs with 0 Source/ refs
p3_findings.fix: Add <!-- Status: PLATFORM — implemented in platform/orchestrator, not in Source/ --> banner.

p3_findings.title: api-contracts.md references non-existent FR-070..FR-085
p3_findings.fix: Map FR-070..FR-085 references to actual FR-dependency-* IDs, or create spec entries.

p3_findings.title: Vite path traversal in optimized deps (GHSA-4w7w-66w2-5vf9)
p3_findings.fix: npm update vitest@^4.1.4 in Source/Frontend (pulls in fixed vite 8.0.9+)

p3_findings.title: esbuild CORS bypass in dev server (GHSA-67mh-4wv8-2f99)
p3_findings.fix: npm update vitest@^4.1.4 (same fix as DEP-004)

p4_findings.title: DependencyPicker swallows search errors silently
p4_findings.fix: Add console.error('DependencyPicker search failed:', err) in catch block.

p4_findings.title: Two eslint-disable suppressions without why-comment
p4_findings.fix: Add inline comment before each disable explaining the intentional dep array pattern.

cross_reference_map.single_fix: Implement /api/search route + add PendingDependencies to WorkItemStatus + log frontend errors
Add 2 Histograms to metrics.ts + route latency middleware in app.ts

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Logger fragmentation and missing log level control
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Consolidate to utils/logger.ts + add LOG_LEVEL guard in emit()

cross_reference_map.root_cause: Traceability tooling not expanded with spec surface
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Add status banners to inactive specs + expand enforcer config

cross_reference_map.root_cause: No automated CVE scanning in CI pipeline
cross_reference_map.single_fix: Add npm audit --audit-level=critical to CI/CD pipeline
cross_reference_map.note: Prevents future recurrence; does not fix existing CVEs

remediation_backlog.title: Add pending_dependencies to WorkItemStatus + fix dispatch gating
Add spec status banners + expand traceability enforcer
Add Prometheus Histograms + route latency middleware
Add npm audit + license-checker to CI/CD pipeline
Fix orphaned FR-070..085 refs in api-contracts.md

audit_metadata.rerun_note: Re-run with services running to capture performance-profiler + chaos-monkey results
